message:
fix: add LoadLockFile tests and ensure consistent lockfile usage

**Unit Tests:**
Add comprehensive unit tests for LoadLockFile function covering:
- Valid lockfile with multiple features
- Missing lockfile (returns nil, nil)
- Invalid JSON (returns error)
- Empty features map

**Lockfile Consistency:**
Load lockfile once in runner.Run() and pass to all three feature resolution points:
1. Image build (via ImageManager.EnsureAvailableWithLockfile)
2. Property resolution (line 983 in runner.go)
3. Lifecycle merging (line 1132 in runner.go)

Previously, lockfile was only loaded in image_manager.go for image builds,
causing inconsistency where property/lifecycle resolution used latest versions
instead of locked versions.

Changes:
- Load lockfile in runner.Run() after loading devcontainer config
- Add EnsureAvailableWithLockfile method to ImageManager
- Add buildImageWithLockfile and buildWithFeaturesAndLockfile methods
- Pass lockfile to feature resolvers in all three resolution points
- Maintain backward compatibility with deprecated methods

Fixes important issues from code review ensuring image build, property
resolution, and lifecycle merging all use the same locked feature versions.

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
